description: The Escrow Locker — manages the full lifecycle of an escrow transaction from offer acceptance through disbursement and recording. Enforces identity verification, wire security, condition satisfaction, and audit retention across all parties and stages.

hard_stops.label: Identity Verified All Parties
hard_stops.logic: No Locker stage advances without all parties identity-verified. OFAC hit = immediate freeze.

hard_stops.label: Offer Chain Required
hard_stops.logic: Locker cannot open on standalone PA. Offer chain required or exception attestation logged.

hard_stops.label: Bank Account Verified Before Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: All disbursement accounts verified via Stripe Financial Connections.

hard_stops.label: Wire Callback Required
hard_stops.logic: Outbound wire verified via callback to number on file from original agreement.

hard_stops.label: Wire Change Hold
hard_stops.logic: Any change to wire instructions triggers automatic hold and human auth.

hard_stops.label: No Disbursement Before Conditions
hard_stops.logic: No disbursement until all conditions marked SATISFIED.

hard_stops.label: Notarization Before Recording
hard_stops.logic: No recording without all notarization confirmed.

hard_stops.label: No DTC Transfer Before Recording
hard_stops.logic: DTC transfer requires recording confirmation number.

hard_stops.label: No Commingling
hard_stops.logic: EMD and closing funds in separate sub-accounts.

hard_stops.label: PII Masked In Logs
hard_stops.logic: SSN, EIN, account numbers masked in audit log.

soft_flags.label: Stage Transition Delay
soft_flags.logic: More than 5 days between stages — flag for review.

soft_flags.label: Condition Deadline Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Less than 3 days until condition deadline — flag for urgency.

soft_flags.label: Multiple Counter Offers
soft_flags.logic: More than 3 counter offers — flag for negotiation complexity.
